title: Update quesadilla image and add creative header phrase

requirements.text: Replace the quesadilla menu card image (located at the card identified by XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[2]/div[1]/div[3]/article[4]/div[1]/div[1]) with a newly generated image showing: a lightly cooked (not fully browned), cheese-only quesadilla with no steam rising from it, plated alongside small side portions of fresh cilantro, sliced white onions, salsa, and sour cream displayed beside the quesadilla to indicate they are available as accompaniments.

quotes: I don't want there any steam coming off of the quesadilla
I want the quesadilla to be not cooked so much
I only want there to be cheese in the quesadilla in the image showing
on the sideshow, all the cilantro sliced onions, salsa, sour cream on the side to show that we offer that too

acceptanceCriteria: The quesadilla image shows no steam effects
The quesadilla appears lightly cooked / pale golden rather than deeply browned
Only cheese is visible as a filling inside the quesadilla
Cilantro, sliced onions, salsa, and sour cream are visible as side items in the image
The updated image is rendered in the quesadilla menu card

requirements.text: Add a short, creative, catchy Mexican food phrase or slogan inside the site header (Header.tsx) to make it feel less bland — for example a witty or bold statement celebrating Mexican cuisine. The phrase should be styled to complement the existing header design without disrupting navigation or layout.

quotes: can you add something creative to put on the header because it's kind of bland at the top right now that I want something that says a cool phrase about Mexican food on the header

acceptanceCriteria: A creative Mexican food-themed phrase or slogan is visible in the header
The phrase is styled consistently with the existing header color palette and typography
Header navigation links and phone button remain fully functional and unobstructed
The phrase is legible on both desktop and mobile layouts

constraints: Do not alter any immutable frontend paths (useInternetIdentity, useActor, main.tsx, ui components)
Only the quesadilla menu card image should be replaced; other menu card images must remain unchanged
Changes to the header must not break existing navigation or mobile hamburger drawer behavior
nonGoals: Changes to other menu items (tacos, burritos, chips & salsa)
Adding new menu items or modifying menu item descriptions
Changes to the hero section background image

required: A lightly cooked pale-golden cheese quesadilla cut in half with no steam, served on a rustic plate with small side portions of fresh green cilantro, thinly sliced white onions, a small bowl of red salsa, and a dollop of sour cream arranged beside it on a warm wooden surface (quesadilla-cheese-sides.dim_800x600.png)
